audit_items.proof_trace: Memory lifecycle is correct: `lwFreeCanvas` frees `canvas->pixels` while `canvas` is still live (L84), then frees `canvas` (L85) — no UAF. In `lolwut5Command`, `lwFreeCanvas` is called exactly once at L281 after all canvas use is complete, and no code follows it. No double-free path exists since `lwDrawSchotter` returns ownership without freeing.
